codeReview.summary: The commit correctly migrates SessionData CSV fields to Arc-backed storage, updates compare workflows/handlers to borrow shared data, and adjusts integration coverage to the new representation. I found no blocking or non-blocking correctness issues in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is no documented, portable mission guidance for the required informal memory check on large CSVs; the worker attempted Linux-specific RSS sampling and could not capture numeric memory deltas on macOS.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff discoveredIssues and verification command output: temporary large-CSV benchmark reported `rss_measurement=unavailable` because `/proc/self/statm` is absent on macOS.

summary: Review passed. The feature intent (Arc-backed session CSV sharing to avoid full-data clones during compare) is implemented end-to-end in backend and transport call sites, with tests updated to validate Arc reuse and persistence flows under the new session model.
